Script.name: GaldamUI
Script.script:
GaldamUI = GaldamUI or {} if GaldamUI._handlers then for _, id in ipairs(GaldamUI._handlers) do pcall(killAnonymousEventHandler, id) end end GaldamUI._handlers = {} GaldamUI.VERSION = "v31" -- 업데이트 적용 확인용 (화면 우상단 표시) local PANEL_W = 0.20 -- 우측 탭 패널 폭 local BOTTOM_H = 120 -- 하단 HUD 바 높이 -- 커스텀 이미지 GaldamUI.imgDir = getMudletHomeDir() .. "/galdamui" pcall(function() lfs.mkdir(GaldamUI.imgDir) end) local IMGBASE = "https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/Binkaze/galdamoosound@main/" local IMGFILES = {"up-arrow.png","down arrow.png","left-arrow.png","right-arrow.png","up.png","down.png","in.png","out.png","look.png","search.png", "status_cold.png","status_heat.png","status_wet.png","status_drunk.png","status_caffeine.png","status_smoke.png","status_nausea.png", "status_bleeding.png","status_stunned.png","status_broken.png","status_hunger.png","status_thirst.png","status_fatigue.png","status_heavy.png"} local function imgPath(f) return GaldamUI.imgDir .. "/" .. f end local function imgTag(f, sz) return "
" end GaldamUI.imgTag = imgTag; GaldamUI.imgPath = imgPath local CSS_BTN = "background-color: rgba(34,84,116,205); border:2px solid #4fa3c7; border-radius:8px; qproperty-alignment:'AlignCenter';" local CSS_ACT = "background-color: rgba(38,70,48,215); border:2px solid #5fae6f; border-radius:8px; qproperty-alignment:'AlignCenter';" local CSS_OFF = "background: qlineargradient(x1:0, y1:0, x2:1, y2:1, stop:0.42 rgba(20,13,15,255), stop:0.46 #cc2b2b, stop:0.54 #cc2b2b, stop:0.58 rgba(20,13,15,255)); border:2px solid #7a2e2e; border-radius:6px; color:#9a7478; font-size:18px; qproperty-alignment:'AlignCenter';" -- 상태 아이콘: 한글 이름(툴팁) + severity 색(경고/심함/위험) GaldamUI.STNAME = {cold="추위/저체온", heat="더위", wet="젖음", drunk="취함", caffeine="카페인", smoke="흡연", nausea="메스꺼움", bleeding="출혈", stunned="감전/기절", broken="골절", hunger="배고픔", thirst="목마름", fatigue="피로", heavy="과적재"} GaldamUI.STSEV = {[1]={b="#f1c40f", bg="rgba(60,52,12,210)"}, [2]={b="#e67e22", bg="rgba(72,42,12,215)"}, [3]={b="#e74c3c", bg="rgba(74,20,20,225)"}} -- 스킬/능력치 한글 라벨 GaldamUI.SKNAME = { brawn="완력", brains="지능", cool="침착", reflexes="반사", endurance="지구력", senses="감각", pistols="권총", rifles="소총", quickdraw="속사", dodge="회피", craft="제작", repair="수리", locksmith="자물쇠", climb="등반", appraise="감정", medic="의술", swim="수영", blades="도검", scavenge="수색", hack="해킹", clubs="둔기", fists="격투", pilot="조종", throw="투척", steal="소매치기", track="추적", chemistry="화학", linguist="언어", sneak="은신", fuck="정사", persuade="설득", whip="채찍", spears="창", teach="교육", fish="낚시", bombs="폭탄", torture="고문", wrestle="레슬링", science="과학", flails="철퇴", ride="승마", focus="집중", } -- 즉시 뜨는 커스텀 툴팁 (네이티브는 표시 지연이 길어 hover 핸들러로 대체) function GaldamUI.showTip(txt) if not GaldamUI.tip then return end local x, y = 0, 0 if not pcall(function() x, y = getMousePosition() end) then return end local wpx = math.max(60, math.min(240, #txt * 6 + 24)) pcall(function() GaldamUI.tip:resize(wpx, 26); GaldamUI.tip:move(x + 14, y + 18) end) GaldamUI.tip:echo("
"..txt.."
") GaldamUI.tip:show() pcall(function() raiseWindow("GaldamTip") end) end function GaldamUI.hideTip() pcall(function() GaldamUI.tip:hide() end) end function GaldamUI.attachTip(w, txt) local ok = pcall(function() w:setOnEnter(function() GaldamUI.showTip(txt) end) w:setOnLeave(function() GaldamUI.hideTip() end) end) if not ok then pcall(function() w:setToolTip(""..txt.."") end) end end function GaldamUI.downloadImages() for _, f in ipairs(IMGFILES) do local lp = imgPath(f) if not (io.exists and io.exists(lp)) then downloadFile(lp, IMGBASE .. (f:gsub(" ", "%%20"))) end end end -- ===== 탭 정의 (확장형: 여기에 항목만 추가하면 새 탭 생성) ===== -- key=식별자, name=표시이름, render=콘텐츠 그리기 함수명(문자열로 늦은 바인딩) GaldamUI.TABS = { {key="players", name="접속자", icon=nil, render="renderPlayers"}, {key="skills", name="스킬", icon=nil, render="renderSkills"}, {key="help", name="도움말", icon=nil, render="renderHelp"}, {key="ach", name="도전과제", icon=nil, render="renderAch"}, {key="events", name="이벤트", icon=nil, render="renderEvents"}, } function GaldamUI.build() -- 기존 정리 (구버전 우측 HUD 요소 포함 — 재로드 시 잔재 제거) for _, k in ipairs({"bottom","rpanel","panel","info","dpad","act","statusBar"}) do if GaldamUI[k] then pcall(function() GaldamUI[k]:hide() end) end end -- ===== 하단 HUD 바 (전체폭, 최하단) ===== GaldamUI.bottom = Geyser.Container:new({name="GaldamBottom", x=0, y=0, width="100%", height=BOTTOM_H}) -- 상태 아이콘 슬롯 (onStatus 에서 px 배치) GaldamUI.statusSlots = {} for i = 1, 14 do local s = Geyser.Label:new({name="stSlot"..i, x=4, y=4, width=46, height=46}, GaldamUI.bottom) s:hide(); GaldamUI.statusSlots[i] = s end -- 게이지 4 (가로, 좌측 78%) GaldamUI.gauges = {} local function gauge(name, label, color, gx, w) local g = Geyser.Gauge:new({name=name, x=gx, y=58, width=(w or "19%"), height=56}, GaldamUI.bottom) g.front:setStyleSheet("background-color:"..color.."; border-radius:5px;") g.back:setStyleSheet("background-color: rgba(40,40,40,200); border-radius:5px;") g.text:setStyleSheet("color:#ffffff; font-size:13px; padding-left:5px;") g:setValue(100,100,""..label..""); return g end GaldamUI.hp = gauge("GaldamHP", "혈액", "#c0392b", "1%", "15%") GaldamUI.cons = gauge("GaldamCon", "의식", "#27ae60", "16.5%", "15%") GaldamUI.thirst = gauge("GaldamThi", "목마름", "#2471a3", "32%", "15%") GaldamUI.hunger = gauge("GaldamHun", "배고픔", "#d68910", "47.5%", "15%") GaldamUI.stress = gauge("GaldamStr", "스트레스", "#f1c40f", "63%", "15%") -- ===== 우측 탭 패널 ===== GaldamUI.rpanel = Geyser.Container:new({name="GaldamRPanel", x="-"..PANEL_W*100 .."%", y=0, width=PANEL_W*100 .."%", height="100%"}) -- 위치 헤더 GaldamUI.locHeader = Geyser.Label:new({name="GaldamLoc", x=0, y=0, width="100%", height=40}, GaldamUI.rpanel) GaldamUI.locHeader:setStyleSheet("background-color: rgba(15,25,35,235); border:1px solid #2a4a5a; border-radius:6px; color:#cfe8f0; qproperty-alignment:'AlignCenter';") GaldamUI.locHeader:echo("
갯담마을
") -- 버전 스탬프 (우상단, 업데이트 적용 확인용) GaldamUI.verTag = Geyser.Label:new({name="GaldamVer", x="74%", y=2, width="25%", height=14}, GaldamUI.rpanel) GaldamUI.verTag:setStyleSheet("background-color: rgba(0,0,0,0); color:#587584; qproperty-alignment:'AlignRight';") GaldamUI.verTag:echo(""..(GaldamUI.VERSION or "?").."") -- 실시간 방 패널 (사람/물건 — hover=명령전체, 클릭=드롭다운 메뉴). 라벨 호스트. 위치는 relayout GaldamUI.roomBox = Geyser.Container:new({name="GaldamRoomBox", x=0, y=44, width="100%", height=200}, GaldamUI.rpanel) GaldamUI.roomRows = GaldamUI.roomRows or {} -- 탭 버튼 행 GaldamUI.tabBtns = {} local n = #GaldamUI.TABS for i, t in ipairs(GaldamUI.TABS) do local bw = math.floor(100 / n) local b = Geyser.Label:new({name="tab_"..t.key, x=((i-1)*bw) .."%", y=44, width=(bw-1) .."%", height=38}, GaldamUI.rpanel) b:setClickCallback(function() GaldamUI.selectTab(t.key) end) GaldamUI.attachTip(b, t.name) GaldamUI.tabBtns[t.key] = b end -- 콘텐츠 (스크롤 가능) GaldamUI.content = Geyser.MiniConsole:new({name="GaldamTabContent", x=0, y=88, width="100%", height=200}, GaldamUI.rpanel) GaldamUI.content:setColor(14, 18, 26) pcall(function() GaldamUI.content:setFontSize(11) end) GaldamUI.content:setWrap(28) -- ===== d-pad 미니창 (드래그) ===== pcall(function() if GaldamUI.dpadWin then GaldamUI.dpadWin:hide() end GaldamUI.dpadWin = Geyser.UserWindow:new({name="갯담이동", width=176, height=190, x=30, y=300}) end) GaldamUI.dirBtns = {} local function dbtn(nm, name, img, cmd, aliases, x, y) local b = Geyser.Label:new({name=nm, x=x, y=y, width=50, height=50}, GaldamUI.dpadWin) b:setClickCallback(function() send(cmd) end) b:setStyleSheet(CSS_BTN); b:echo(imgTag(img, 34)) GaldamUI.attachTip(b, name) table.insert(GaldamUI.dirBtns, {btn=b, aliases=aliases, img=img, name=name}) return b end dbtn("dpUp", "위(올라가기)", "up.png", "올라가기", {"올라가기","up","u","위","상"}, 4, 4) dbtn("dpN", "북", "up-arrow.png", "북", {"북","north","n"}, 60, 4) dbtn("dpIn", "들어가기", "in.png", "들어가기", {"들어가기","in","enter","안","입구"}, 116, 4) dbtn("dpW", "서", "left-arrow.png", "서", {"서","west","w"}, 4, 58) dbtn("dpE", "동", "right-arrow.png", "동", {"동","east","e"}, 116, 58) dbtn("dpDn", "아래(내려가기)","down.png", "내려가기", {"내려가기","down","d","아래","하"}, 4, 112) dbtn("dpS", "남", "down arrow.png", "남", {"남","south","s"}, 60, 112) dbtn("dpOut", "나가기", "out.png", "나가기", {"나가기","out","밖","출구","exit"}, 116, 112) GaldamUI.lookBtn = Geyser.Label:new({name="dpLook", x=60, y=58, width=50, height=50}, GaldamUI.dpadWin) GaldamUI.lookBtn:setStyleSheet(CSS_ACT); GaldamUI.lookBtn:echo(imgTag("look.png", 34)) GaldamUI.lookBtn:setClickCallback(function() send("look") end) GaldamUI.attachTip(GaldamUI.lookBtn, "둘러보기") -- 수배 오버레이 (좌상단) if GaldamUI.wanted then GaldamUI.wanted:hide() end GaldamUI.wanted = Geyser.Label:new({name="GaldamWan", x="-43%", y=4, width="20%", height=66}) GaldamUI.wanted:setStyleSheet("background-color: rgba(22,14,28,235); border:1px solid #5a3a6a; border-radius:6px; qproperty-alignment:'AlignCenter';") GaldamUI.wanted:hide() GaldamUI.cycleGen = (GaldamUI.cycleGen or 0) + 1 GaldamUI.cyclePhase = 0 GaldamUI.cycleStep(GaldamUI.cycleGen) -- 지도창 pcall(function() if not GaldamUI.mapWin then GaldamUI.mapWin = Geyser.UserWindow:new({name="갯담지도", width=520, height=430, x=900, y=300}) end GaldamUI.mapWin:setFontSize(14) GaldamUI.mapWin:cecho("\n 지도 없음") end) -- 커스텀 툴팁 라벨 (최상위, 마지막 생성 → z순서 위) pcall(function() if GaldamUI.tip then GaldamUI.tip:hide() end GaldamUI.tip = Geyser.Label:new({name="GaldamTip", x=0, y=0, width=140, height=26}) GaldamUI.tip:setStyleSheet("background-color: rgba(16,20,28,245); border:1px solid #6fbf80; border-radius:5px; color:#eafff0;") GaldamUI.tip:hide() end) GaldamUI.built = true GaldamUI.activeTab = GaldamUI.activeTab or "players" GaldamUI.relayout() GaldamUI.selectTab(GaldamUI.activeTab) end function GaldamUI.relayout() if not GaldamUI.built then return end local w, h = getMainWindowSize() local rw = math.floor(w * PANEL_W) setBorderRight(rw); setBorderBottom(BOTTOM_H) pcall(function() GaldamUI.bottom:move(0, h - BOTTOM_H); GaldamUI.bottom:resize(w, BOTTOM_H) local ph = h - BOTTOM_H GaldamUI.rpanel:move(w - rw, 0); GaldamUI.rpanel:resize(rw, ph) -- 상하분할: [헤더] / [방 패널] / [탭 버튼] / [탭 콘텐츠] local headH, tabH, gap = 40, 32, 4 local avail = ph - headH - tabH - gap * 4 if avail < 80 then avail = 80 end local roomH = math.floor(avail * 0.52) -- 상단: 실시간 방 패널 local contentH = avail - roomH -- 하단: 탭 콘텐츠 GaldamUI.locHeader:move(0, 0); GaldamUI.locHeader:resize(rw, headH) local roomY = headH + gap GaldamUI.roomBox:move(0, roomY); GaldamUI.roomBox:resize(rw, roomH) local tabY = roomY + roomH + gap local n = #GaldamUI.TABS local bw = math.floor(rw / n) for i, t in ipairs(GaldamUI.TABS) do local b = GaldamUI.tabBtns[t.key] if b then b:move((i - 1) * bw, tabY); b:resize(bw - 2, tabH) end end GaldamUI.content:move(0, tabY + tabH + gap); GaldamUI.content:resize(rw, contentH) end) GaldamUI.renderRoom() end function GaldamUI.setExits(elist) if not GaldamUI.dirBtns then return end local avail = {} for _, e in ipairs(elist or {}) do avail[tostring(e)] = true end for _, d in ipairs(GaldamUI.dirBtns) do local on = false for _, al in ipairs(d.aliases) do if avail[al] then on = true; break end end if on then d.btn:setStyleSheet(CSS_BTN); d.btn:echo(imgTag(d.img, 34)) GaldamUI.attachTip(d.btn, d.name) else d.btn:setStyleSheet(CSS_OFF) d.btn:echo("
"..d.name.."
") GaldamUI.attachTip(d.btn, d.name.." · 막힌 길") end end end -- ===== 탭 전환 / 렌더 ===== function GaldamUI.selectTab(key) if not GaldamUI.built then return end GaldamUI.activeTab = key for _, t in ipairs(GaldamUI.TABS) do local b = GaldamUI.tabBtns[t.key] if b then if t.key == key then b:setStyleSheet(CSS_ACT) else b:setStyleSheet(CSS_BTN) end if t.icon then b:echo(imgTag(t.icon, 28)) else b:echo("
"..t.name.."
") end end end GaldamUI.renderTab() end function GaldamUI.renderTab() if not (GaldamUI.built and GaldamUI.content) then return end for _, t in ipairs(GaldamUI.TABS) do if t.key == GaldamUI.activeTab then local fn = GaldamUI[t.render] if fn then pcall(fn) else GaldamUI.content:clear(); GaldamUI.content:cecho("\n (미구현)") end return end end end function GaldamUI.renderPlayers() GaldamUI.content:clear() GaldamUI.content:cecho("\n ● 접속 중\n\n") local d = gmcp.Galdam and gmcp.Galdam.Players local cnt = 0 if d and d.list and d.list ~= "" then for entry in tostring(d.list):gmatch("[^;]+") do local nm, ar = entry:match("([^|]*)|(.*)") GaldamUI.content:cecho(" "..(nm or entry).." "..(ar or "").."\n") cnt = cnt + 1 end end if cnt == 0 then GaldamUI.content:cecho(" (목록 없음)\n") end end function GaldamUI.renderSkills() GaldamUI.content:clear() local d = gmcp.Galdam and gmcp.Galdam.Skills local stats, skills = {}, {} if d and d.list and d.list ~= "" then for entry in tostring(d.list):gmatch("[^;]+") do local nm, v, k = entry:match("([^|]*)|([^|]*)|([^|]*)") if nm then local kor = GaldamUI.SKNAME[nm] or nm if k == "S" then stats[#stats+1] = {kor, v} else skills[#skills+1] = {kor, v} end end end end GaldamUI.content:cecho("\n ● 능력치\n\n") if #stats > 0 then for _, e in ipairs(stats) do GaldamUI.content:cecho(" "..e[1].." "..e[2].."\n") end else GaldamUI.content:cecho(" (정보 없음)\n") end GaldamUI.content:cecho("\n ● 스킬\n\n") if #skills > 0 then for _, e in ipairs(skills) do GaldamUI.content:cecho(" "..e[1].." "..e[2].."\n") end else GaldamUI.content:cecho(" (배운 스킬 없음)\n") end end -- 도움말 데이터 (카테고리 클릭 → 명령어/설명). 변수부는 [..]로 표기 (cecho가 <>를 색태그로 먹음) GaldamUI.HELP = { {"이동", {"동 · 서 · 남 · 북", "올라가기 · 내려가기", "들어가기 · 나가기", "왼쪽 방향키 창으로도 됩니다."}}, {"살펴보기", {"보기 [대상]", "살펴보기 [대상]", "패널 항목 클릭으로도 됩니다."}}, {"먹기·마시기", {"먹기 [음식]", "마시기 [음료]"}}, {"줍기·버리기", {"줍기 [물건] (=집기)", "버리기 [물건] (=놓기)"}}, {"장착·사용", {"장착 [무기/옷]", "사용 [물건]", "읽기 [글]"}}, {"용기·상자", {"개봉 / 덮기 [용기]", "엿보기 [용기]", "꺼내기 [물건] [용기]에서", "넣기 [물건] [용기]에"}}, {"복합 명령", {"조사로 자연스럽게:", "꺼내기 콜라 자판기에서", "넣기 동전 상자에", "주기 사과 영희에게", "지불 5000 상인에게", "~에서=출처 ~에게=상대 ~에=위치"}}, {"장소 명령어", {"이 방에서만 쓰는 명령.", "패널 ● 장소 명령어 또는 ex here", "예) 바다: 첨벙·담그기·들이켜기"}}, {"전투", {"공격 [상대]", "항복"}}, {"패널 사용법", {"오른쪽 패널:", "· 항목 클릭 → 상호작용 메뉴", "· ✨ = 방금 나타난 것", "· 초록=바로실행 / 회색=추가입력"}}, } function GaldamUI.helpPick(cat) GaldamUI.helpCat = (cat and cat ~= "") and cat or nil GaldamUI.renderTab() end function GaldamUI.renderHelp() local mn = "GaldamTabContent" GaldamUI.content:clear() if not GaldamUI.helpCat then GaldamUI.content:cecho("\n ● 도움말 (눌러 보기)\n\n") for _, h in ipairs(GaldamUI.HELP) do GaldamUI.content:cecho(" ▸ ") pcall(function() echoLink(mn, h[1], "GaldamUI.helpPick([[" .. h[1] .. "]])", h[1], true) end) GaldamUI.content:echo("\n") end else GaldamUI.content:cecho("\n ● " .. GaldamUI.helpCat .. "\n\n") for _, h in ipairs(GaldamUI.HELP) do if h[1] == GaldamUI.helpCat then for _, ln in ipairs(h[2]) do GaldamUI.content:cecho(" " .. ln .. "\n") end break end end GaldamUI.content:cecho("\n ") pcall(function() echoLink(mn, "← 목록으로", "GaldamUI.helpPick()", "뒤로", true) end) GaldamUI.content:echo("\n") end end function GaldamUI.renderEvents() GaldamUI.content:clear() GaldamUI.content:cecho("\n ● 진행 중 이벤트\n\n 🚧 준비 중\n 이벤트 시스템이 구축되면\n 여기에 표시됩니다.\n") end -- 도전과제 탭 (접이식 트리): list = "id|이름|설명|달성0/1|최초자|달성수|카테고리;..." GaldamUI.achTopClosed = GaldamUI.achTopClosed or {} -- ["done"]/["todo"]=true면 접힘 GaldamUI.achCatClosed = GaldamUI.achCatClosed or {} -- ["done:전투"]=true면 접힘 GaldamUI.ACHCATORDER = {"전투", "탐험", "생활", "스킬", "범죄", "직업"} function GaldamUI.achToggleTop(w) GaldamUI.achTopClosed[w] = not GaldamUI.achTopClosed[w]; GaldamUI.renderTab() end function GaldamUI.achToggleCat(k) GaldamUI.achCatClosed[k] = not GaldamUI.achCatClosed[k]; GaldamUI.renderTab() end function GaldamUI.achSelect(id) if GaldamUI.achSel == id then GaldamUI.achSel = nil else GaldamUI.achSel = id end; GaldamUI.renderTab() end function GaldamUI.renderAch() local mn = "GaldamTabContent" GaldamUI.content:clear() local d = gmcp.Galdam and gmcp.Galdam.Achievements GaldamUI.content:cecho("\n ● 도전과제\n\n") if not (d and d.list and d.list ~= "") then GaldamUI.content:cecho(" (아직 정보가 없습니다)\n"); return end local done, todo = {}, {} for entry in tostring(d.list):gmatch("[^;]+") do local id, nm, desc, un, first, cnt, cat = entry:match("([^|]*)|([^|]*)|([^|]*)|([^|]*)|([^|]*)|([^|]*)|([^|]*)") if nm then local rec = {id = id, nm = nm, desc = desc, first = first, cnt = cnt, cat = (cat ~= "" and cat or "기타")} if un == "1" then done[#done + 1] = rec else todo[#todo + 1] = rec end end end local function bycat(items) local g, ord = {}, {} for _, r in ipairs(items) do if not g[r.cat] then g[r.cat] = {}; ord[#ord + 1] = r.cat end table.insert(g[r.cat], r) end local sorted = {} for _, c in ipairs(GaldamUI.ACHCATORDER) do if g[c] then sorted[#sorted + 1] = c end end for _, c in ipairs(ord) do local seen = false for _, x in ipairs(sorted) do if x == c then seen = true end end if not seen then sorted[#sorted + 1] = c end end return g, sorted end local function dwidth(s) local w, i = 0, 1 while i <= #s do local b = s:byte(i) if b < 0x80 then w = w + 1; i = i + 1 elseif b < 0xE0 then w = w + 1; i = i + 2 elseif b < 0xF0 then w = w + 2; i = i + 3 else w = w + 2; i = i + 4 end end return w end local function wrap(text, maxw) local lines, cur, cw = {}, "", 0 for word in tostring(text):gmatch("%S+") do local ww = dwidth(word) if cw > 0 and cw + 1 + ww > maxw then lines[#lines + 1] = cur; cur = word; cw = ww elseif cw == 0 then cur = word; cw = ww else cur = cur .. " " .. word; cw = cw + 1 + ww end end if cur ~= "" then lines[#lines + 1] = cur end return lines end local maxw = 22 pcall(function() local px = GaldamUI.content:get_width(); if px and px > 60 then maxw = math.max(14, math.floor((px - 16) / 9)) end end) local function section(title, items, skey, color) local closed = GaldamUI.achTopClosed[skey] GaldamUI.content:cecho(" " .. color) pcall(function() echoLink(mn, (closed and "▶ " or "▼ ") .. title .. " (" .. #items .. ")", "GaldamUI.achToggleTop([[" .. skey .. "]])", "펼치기/접기", true) end) GaldamUI.content:echo("\n") if closed then return end local g, cats = bycat(items) for _, cat in ipairs(cats) do local ck = skey .. ":" .. cat local cc = GaldamUI.achCatClosed[ck] GaldamUI.content:cecho(" ") pcall(function() echoLink(mn, (cc and "▸ " or "▾ ") .. cat .. " (" .. #g[cat] .. ")", "GaldamUI.achToggleCat([[" .. ck .. "]])", "펼치기/접기", true) end) GaldamUI.content:echo("\n") if not cc then for _, r in ipairs(g[cat]) do GaldamUI.content:cecho(" " .. (skey == "done" and "✔ " or "🔒 ")) pcall(function() echoLink(mn, r.nm, "GaldamUI.achSelect([[" .. r.id .. "]])", "눌러 상세보기", true) end) GaldamUI.content:echo("\n") if GaldamUI.achSel == r.id then for _, ln in ipairs(wrap(r.desc, maxw - 5)) do GaldamUI.content:cecho(" " .. ln .. "\n") end if r.first ~= "" then GaldamUI.content:cecho(" 🥇 최초 " .. r.first .. " (" .. r.cnt .. "명)\n") else GaldamUI.content:cecho(" · 미개척\n") end end end end end GaldamUI.content:echo("\n") end GaldamUI.content:cecho(" 달성 " .. #done .. " / 전체 " .. (#done + #todo) .. "\n\n") section("달성", done, "done", "") section("미달성", todo, "todo", "") end -- ===== GMCP 핸들러 ===== -- 방 패널: 항목 = "이름|라벨=명령=kind^..." (kind: go=클릭실행 / arg=추가입력 회색) function GaldamUI.parseCmds(rest) local cmds = {} for c in tostring(rest or ""):gmatch("[^%^]+") do local lbl, cmd, kind = c:match("([^=]*)=([^=]*)=([^=]*)") if lbl then cmds[#cmds + 1] = {label = lbl, cmd = cmd, kind = kind} end end return cmds end -- 항목 = "번호|이름|quick명령" (전체명령은 클릭 시 _galdamobjcmds로 on-demand) function GaldamUI.parseEntity(entry) local id, name, rest = entry:match("([^|]*)|([^|]*)|(.*)") if not id then return (entry ~= "" and entry or "?"), {}, "" end return (name ~= "" and name or "?"), GaldamUI.parseCmds(rest), id end function GaldamUI.getRow(i) GaldamUI.roomRows = GaldamUI.roomRows or {} if not GaldamUI.roomRows[i] then GaldamUI.roomRows[i] = Geyser.Label:new({name = "grRow" .. i, x = 2, y = 0, width = "97%", height = 20}, GaldamUI.roomBox) end return GaldamUI.roomRows[i] end -- hover: 간결 안내만 (명령 전체는 클릭 메뉴에서) function GaldamUI.showCmdTip(name, cmds) if not GaldamUI.tip then return end local x, y = 0, 0 if not pcall(function() x, y = getMousePosition() end) then return end local txt = "" .. name .. "
클릭하면 상호작용 메뉴" local wpx, hpx = 152, 40 pcall(function() GaldamUI.tip:resize(wpx, hpx); GaldamUI.tip:move(math.max(0, x - wpx - 6), y + 12) end) GaldamUI.tip:echo("
" .. txt .. "
") GaldamUI.tip:show() pcall(function() raiseWindow("GaldamTip") end) end function GaldamUI.closeCtxMenu() if GaldamUI.ctxTimer then pcall(function() killTimer(GaldamUI.ctxTimer) end); GaldamUI.ctxTimer = nil end if GaldamUI.ctxMenu then pcall(function() GaldamUI.ctxMenu:hide() end) end GaldamUI.ctxVisible = false GaldamUI.ctxOpenId = nil end -- 메뉴 항목 클릭 처리 (echoLink 의 Lua 명령에서 전역 경로로 호출) function GaldamUI.menuPick(cmd, isArg) GaldamUI.closeCtxMenu() if isArg then printCmdLine(cmd) else send(cmd) end end -- 드롭다운 메뉴 = MiniConsole + echoLink (Label 자식은 렌더 안 됨 → 미니콘솔) -- go=클릭 즉시 실행(초록) / arg=명령창에 채워주기(회색) function GaldamUI.fillCtxMenu(name, cmds) local mn = "GaldamCtxMenu" if not GaldamUI.ctxMenu then return end local h = (#cmds + 1) * 19 + 12 pcall(function() GaldamUI.ctxMenu:resize(196, h) end) pcall(function() clearWindow(mn); cecho(mn, " " .. name .. "\n") end) for _, c in ipairs(cmds) do local arg = (c.kind == "arg") local lua = "GaldamUI.menuPick([[" .. c.cmd .. "]], " .. tostring(arg) .. ")" pcall(function() if arg then setFgColor(mn, 124, 133, 142) echoLink(mn, " ○ " .. c.label .. " (입력)", lua, "추가 입력 필요: " .. c.label, true) else setFgColor(mn, 150, 216, 160) echoLink(mn, " ● " .. c.label, lua, c.label, true) end echo(mn, "\n") end) end end function GaldamUI.openCtxMenu(name, cmds, id) local mn = "GaldamCtxMenu" -- 토글: 같은 대상 메뉴가 이미 열려 있으면 다시 클릭 시 닫기 if GaldamUI.ctxVisible and tostring(GaldamUI.ctxOpenId or "") == tostring(id or "") then GaldamUI.closeCtxMenu() return end if not GaldamUI.ctxMenu then GaldamUI.ctxMenu = Geyser.MiniConsole:new({name = mn, x = 0, y = 0, width = 196, height = 100}) GaldamUI.ctxMenu:setColor(13, 19, 27) pcall(function() GaldamUI.ctxMenu:setFontSize(11) end) GaldamUI.ctxMenu:setWrap(44) end local w = 196 local h = (#cmds + 2) * 19 + 12 local x, y = 0, 0 pcall(function() x, y = getMousePosition() end) local sw, sh = getMainWindowSize() if x + w > sw then x = sw - w - 6 end if y + h > sh then y = math.max(0, sh - h - 6) end pcall(function() GaldamUI.ctxMenu:move(x, y) end) GaldamUI.ctxOpenId = id or "" GaldamUI.ctxName = name GaldamUI.fillCtxMenu(name, cmds) pcall(function() GaldamUI.ctxMenu:show(); raiseWindow(mn) end) GaldamUI.ctxVisible = true if GaldamUI.ctxTimer then pcall(function() killTimer(GaldamUI.ctxTimer) end) end GaldamUI.ctxTimer = tempTimer(8, function() GaldamUI.closeCtxMenu() end) -- 객체면 전체 명령을 on-demand 요청 (여기/방은 id 없음 → push의 here 그대로) if id and id ~= "" then send("_galdamobjcmds " .. id, false) end end -- on-demand 응답: 현재 열린 메뉴면 전체 명령으로 채움 function GaldamUI.onObjMenu() local d = gmcp.Galdam and gmcp.Galdam.ObjMenu if not (d and d.id) then return end if tostring(d.id) == tostring(GaldamUI.ctxOpenId) then GaldamUI.fillCtxMenu(GaldamUI.ctxName or "?", GaldamUI.parseCmds(d.cmds)) pcall(function() raiseWindow("GaldamCtxMenu") end) end end -- 새 등장 항목 ✨반짝 펄스 (cycleStep 0.1초 루프에서 호출). 수배 별 깜빡임과 같은 결 function GaldamUI.animateRoom() if not (GaldamUI.liveRows and GaldamUI.blinkUntil) then return end local tick = GaldamUI.tick or 0 for _, lr in ipairs(GaldamUI.liveRows) do local bu = GaldamUI.blinkUntil[lr.id] if bu then if tick < bu then if (math.floor(tick / 2) % 2) == 0 then lr.lb:setStyleSheet("background-color: rgba(241,196,15,0.38); border:1px solid #f1c40f; border-radius:4px; qproperty-alignment:'AlignLeft';") lr.lb:echo(" ✨ " .. lr.name .. "") else lr.lb:setStyleSheet("background-color: rgba(241,196,15,0.10); border:1px solid #6b5a12; border-radius:4px; qproperty-alignment:'AlignLeft';") lr.lb:echo(" ✨ " .. lr.name .. "") end else GaldamUI.blinkUntil[lr.id] = nil lr.lb:setStyleSheet("background-color: rgba(255,255,255,0.045); border-radius:4px; qproperty-alignment:'AlignLeft';") lr.lb:echo(" ▸ " .. lr.name .. "") end end end end function GaldamUI.renderRoom() if not (GaldamUI.built and GaldamUI.roomBox) then return end pcall(function() GaldamUI.closeCtxMenu() end) GaldamUI.roomRows = GaldamUI.roomRows or {} GaldamUI.liveRows = {} local r = gmcp.Galdam and gmcp.Galdam.Room local rowH, y, idx, full = 20, 2, 0, false local boxH = 200 pcall(function() boxH = GaldamUI.roomBox:get_height() end) local function row(html, col, cmds, id) if full or (y + rowH > boxH - 2) then full = true; return end idx = idx + 1 local lb = GaldamUI.getRow(idx) if cmds then lb:setStyleSheet("background-color: rgba(255,255,255,0.045); border-radius:4px; qproperty-alignment:'AlignLeft';") lb:echo(" ▸ " .. html .. "") lb:setOnEnter(function() GaldamUI.showCmdTip(html, cmds) end) lb:setOnLeave(function() GaldamUI.hideTip() end) lb:setClickCallback(function() GaldamUI.openCtxMenu(html, cmds, id) end) if id and id ~= "" then GaldamUI.liveRows[#GaldamUI.liveRows + 1] = {lb = lb, id = id, name = html, col = col} end else lb:setStyleSheet("background-color: rgba(0,0,0,0);") lb:echo(html) lb:setOnEnter(function() end); lb:setOnLeave(function() end); lb:setClickCallback(function() end) end lb:move(2, y); lb:resize("96%", rowH); lb:show(); y = y + rowH end if not r then row("(방 정보 없음)") else row("● 사람") local hasP = false for e in tostring(r.people or ""):gmatch("[^;]+") do local nm, cm, id = GaldamUI.parseEntity(e); row(nm, "#a8d8ff", cm, id); hasP = true end if not hasP then row(" (없음)") end row("● 물건") local hasO = false for e in tostring(r.objects or ""):gmatch("[^;]+") do local nm, cm, id = GaldamUI.parseEntity(e); row(nm, "#cfe0a0", cm, id); hasO = true end if not hasO then row(" (없음)") end -- ● 여기(이 방) — 방 자체의 특수/환경 명령 (ex here). here는 push에 전체가 들어옴 → id 없음 if r.here and tostring(r.here) ~= "" then local hc = GaldamUI.parseCmds(r.here) if #hc > 0 then row("● 장소 명령어") row(tostring(r.name or "이 방"), "#9fd0e8", hc, nil) end end if full then row(" …더 있음") end end -- 새로 등장한 항목 ✨반짝 (방 이동 시엔 전체가 바뀌므로 제외) local cur = {} for _, lr in ipairs(GaldamUI.liveRows) do cur[lr.id] = true end GaldamUI.blinkUntil = GaldamUI.blinkUntil or {} local rid = r and tostring(r.roomid) or nil if rid and GaldamUI.prevRoomId == rid then for id in pairs(cur) do if not (GaldamUI.prevIds and GaldamUI.prevIds[id]) then GaldamUI.blinkUntil[id] = (GaldamUI.tick or 0) + 32 end end end for id in pairs(GaldamUI.blinkUntil) do if not cur[id] then GaldamUI.blinkUntil[id] = nil end end GaldamUI.prevIds = cur GaldamUI.prevRoomId = rid for i = idx + 1, #GaldamUI.roomRows do pcall(function() GaldamUI.roomRows[i]:hide() end) end end function GaldamUI.onRoom() local r = gmcp.Galdam and gmcp.Galdam.Room if not (GaldamUI.built and r) then return end GaldamUI.locHeader:echo(string.format("
%s
%s
", r.name or "?", r.area or "")) GaldamUI.setExits(r.exits or {}) GaldamUI.renderRoom() end function GaldamUI.cycleStep(gen) if gen ~= GaldamUI.cycleGen then return end GaldamUI.tick = (GaldamUI.tick or 0) + 1 GaldamUI.cyclePhase = (GaldamUI.cyclePhase or 0) + 0.25 GaldamUI.renderWanted() pcall(function() GaldamUI.animateRoom() end) tempTimer(0.1, "GaldamUI.cycleStep("..gen..")") end function GaldamUI.renderWanted() if not (GaldamUI.built and GaldamUI.wanted) then return end local tier = GaldamUI.curTier or 0 if tier <= 0 then GaldamUI.wanted:hide(); return end local tick = GaldamUI.tick or 0 local bl = GaldamUI.blink if bl and tick >= bl.endTick then GaldamUI.blink = nil; bl = nil end local t = (math.sin(GaldamUI.cyclePhase or 0) + 1) / 2 local col = string.format("#%02x%02x%02x", math.floor(204+(43-204)*t), math.floor(43+(107-43)*t), math.floor(43+(204-43)*t)) local stars = "" for i = 1, 6 do local ch, c if bl and bl.set[i] then local on = (math.floor(tick / bl.interval) % 2) == 0 ch = "★" if bl.kind == "add" then c = on and "#f1c40f" or "#473807" else c = on and "#f1c40f" or "#ffffff" end elseif i <= tier then ch = "★"; c = "#f1c40f" else ch = "☆"; c = "#444444" end stars = stars .. ""..ch.."" end local lines = {} lines[#lines+1] = "수배" lines[#lines+1] = stars local h = 18 + #lines * 42 if GaldamUI.wantedH ~= h then pcall(function() GaldamUI.wanted:resize("21%", h) end); GaldamUI.wantedH = h end GaldamUI.wanted:echo("
"..table.concat(lines, "
").."
") GaldamUI.wanted:show() end function GaldamUI.onVitals() local v = gmcp.Char and gmcp.Char.Vitals if not (GaldamUI.built and v) then return end if v.hp then GaldamUI.hp:setValue(tonumber(v.hp) or 0, tonumber(v.hp_max) or 100, "혈액 "..tostring(v.hp).."") end if v.cons and GaldamUI.cons then GaldamUI.cons:setValue(tonumber(v.cons) or 0, tonumber(v.cons_max) or 100, "의식 "..tostring(v.cons).."/"..tostring(v.cons_max).."") end if v.thirst then local t=tonumber(v.thirst) or 0; GaldamUI.thirst:setValue(math.min(t,500),500,string.format("목마름 %d",math.floor(t))) end if v.hunger then local h=tonumber(v.hunger) or 0; GaldamUI.hunger:setValue(math.min(h,500),500,string.format("배고픔 %d",math.floor(h))) end if v.stress then local s=tonumber(v.stress) or 0; GaldamUI.stress:setValue(math.min(s,500),500,string.format("스트레스 %d",math.floor(s))) end if v.wanted then local w = tonumber(v.wanted) or 0 local nt = (w>=171 and 6) or (w>=141 and 5) or (w>=101 and 4) or (w>=61 and 3) or (w>=31 and 2) or (w>=1 and 1) or 0 local prev = GaldamUI.prevTier or 0 if nt > prev then local set = {}; for i = prev+1, nt do set[i] = true end GaldamUI.blink = {set=set, interval=5, endTick=(GaldamUI.tick or 0)+30, kind="add"} elseif nt < prev and nt > 0 then local set = {}; for i = 1, nt do set[i] = true end GaldamUI.blink = {set=set, interval=2, endTick=(GaldamUI.tick or 0)+20, kind="remove"} end GaldamUI.prevTier = nt GaldamUI.curTier = nt GaldamUI.renderWanted() end end function GaldamUI.onStatus() local d = gmcp.Galdam and gmcp.Galdam.Status if not (GaldamUI.built and d and GaldamUI.statusSlots) then return end local list = {} for tok in tostring(d.icons or ""):gmatch("[^,]+") do local k, sv = tok:match("(%a+):(%d+)") if k then list[#list+1] = {k=k, sv=tonumber(sv) or 1} end end local cell, step = 46, 50 for i, slot in ipairs(GaldamUI.statusSlots) do local it = list[i] if it then local sev = GaldamUI.STSEV[it.sv] or GaldamUI.STSEV[1] pcall(function() slot:move(6 + (i-1)*step, 4); slot:resize(cell, cell) end) slot:setStyleSheet("background-color:"..sev.bg.."; border:2px solid "..sev.b.."; border-radius:8px; qproperty-alignment:'AlignCenter';") slot:echo(imgTag("status_"..it.k..".png", 38)) GaldamUI.attachTip(slot, GaldamUI.STNAME[it.k] or it.k) slot:show() else slot:hide() end end end function GaldamUI.onMap() local d = gmcp.Galdam and gmcp.Galdam.Map if not (GaldamUI.built and GaldamUI.mapWin and d) then return end GaldamUI.mapWin:clear() if d.has == 1 and d.grid then local raw = d.grid:gsub("<>", "\27"):gsub("<>", "\n") GaldamUI.mapWin:decho(ansi2decho(raw)) else GaldamUI.mapWin:cecho("\n 지도 없음 (갯담 지도 필요)") end end function GaldamUI.refresh() if not GaldamUI.built then return end pcall(function() GaldamUI.lookBtn:setStyleSheet(CSS_ACT); GaldamUI.lookBtn:echo(imgTag("look.png", 34)) end) GaldamUI.onRoom(); GaldamUI.onVitals(); GaldamUI.onStatus(); GaldamUI.renderTab() end if not GaldamUI.built then GaldamUI.build() end GaldamUI.relayout() GaldamUI.downloadImages() table.insert(GaldamUI._handlers, registerAnonymousEventHandler("gmcp.Galdam.Room", function() GaldamUI.onRoom() end)) table.insert(GaldamUI._handlers, registerAnonymousEventHandler("gmcp.Galdam.ObjMenu", function() GaldamUI.onObjMenu() end)) table.insert(GaldamUI._handlers, registerAnonymousEventHandler("gmcp.Char.Vitals", function() GaldamUI.onVitals() end)) table.insert(GaldamUI._handlers, registerAnonymousEventHandler("gmcp.Galdam.Status", function() GaldamUI.onStatus() end)) table.insert(GaldamUI._handlers, registerAnonymousEventHandler("gmcp.Galdam.Map", function() GaldamUI.onMap() end)) table.insert(GaldamUI._handlers, registerAnonymousEventHandler("gmcp.Galdam.Players", function() if GaldamUI.activeTab=="players" then GaldamUI.renderTab() end end)) table.insert(GaldamUI._handlers, registerAnonymousEventHandler("gmcp.Galdam.Skills", function() if GaldamUI.activeTab=="skills" then GaldamUI.renderTab() end end)) table.insert(GaldamUI._handlers, registerAnonymousEventHandler("gmcp.Galdam.Achievements", function() if GaldamUI.activeTab=="ach" then GaldamUI.renderTab() end end)) table.insert(GaldamUI._handlers, registerAnonymousEventHandler("sysWindowResizeEvent", function() GaldamUI.relayout() end)) table.insert(GaldamUI._handlers, registerAnonymousEventHandler("sysDownloadDone", function() GaldamUI.refresh() end)) GaldamUI.onRoom(); GaldamUI.onVitals(); GaldamUI.onStatus(); GaldamUI.onMap()

Script.name: GaldamLockpickQTE
Script.script:
-- ===== Galdam 자물쇠 따기 QTE (v2 클릭) ===== GaldamPick = GaldamPick or {} local GP = GaldamPick GP.W = 46 function GaldamPick_hit() -- 전역 (클릭/키 콜백용) GaldamPick.hit() end function GP.makeWindow() if not GP.win then GP.win = Geyser.Label:new({ name = "GaldamPickWin", x = "30%", y = "33%", width = "40%", height = "28%", }) GP.win:setStyleSheet([[ background-color: rgba(18,18,24,238); border: 2px solid #c8a05a; border-radius: 10px; ]]) GP.win:setFontSize(13) GP.win:hide() end GP.win:setClickCallback("GaldamPick_hit") -- 창 클릭 = 입력 (재로드시에도 재적용) end function GP.render() local cells = {} local needle = math.floor((GP.pos or 0) / 100 * GP.W + 0.5) local zs = math.floor((GP.zstart or 0) / 100 * GP.W + 0.5) local ze = math.floor(((GP.zstart or 0) + (GP.zsize or 0)) / 100 * GP.W + 0.5) local cz = math.floor(((GP.zstart or 0) + (GP.zsize or 0) / 2) / 100 * GP.W + 0.5) for i = 0, GP.W do if i == needle then cells[#cells+1] = "|" elseif i == cz then cells[#cells+1] = "@" elseif i >= zs and i <= ze then cells[#cells+1] = "#" else cells[#cells+1] = "-" end end local html = string.format( "

[ 자물쇠 따기 ]

%s

진행 %d / %d    라운드 %d

바늘이 초록(@중앙)일 때  창을 클릭!
", table.concat(cells), GP.prog or 0, GP.target or 5, GP.round or 1) GP.win:echo(html) end function GP.tick() if not GP.active then return end GP.pos = GP.pos + GP.dir * GP.step if GP.pos >= 100 then GP.pos = 100; GP.dir = -1 end if GP.pos <= 0 then GP.pos = 0; GP.dir = 1 end GP.render() GP.timer = tempTimer(0.045, GP.tick) end function GP.onRound() local d = gmcp.Galdam.Pick.Round if not d then return end GP.makeWindow() GP.zstart = tonumber(d.zone_start) or 40 GP.zsize = tonumber(d.zone_size) or 20 GP.prog = tonumber(d.progress) or 0 GP.target = tonumber(d.target) or 5 GP.round = tonumber(d.round) or 1 GP.step = math.max(1.8, (tonumber(d.speed) or 50) / 12) GP.pos = 0; GP.dir = 1; GP.active = true if GP.timer then killTimer(GP.timer) end GP.win:show() GP.tick() end function GP.hit() if not GP.active then return end GP.active = false if GP.timer then killTimer(GP.timer); GP.timer = nil end send("qtehit " .. tostring(math.floor((GP.pos or 0) + 0.5))) end function GP.onEnd() GP.active = false if GP.timer then killTimer(GP.timer); GP.timer = nil end if GP.win then GP.win:hide() end end function GP.onConnect() send("qte_on") end if GP.h1 then killAnonymousEventHandler(GP.h1) end if GP.h2 then killAnonymousEventHandler(GP.h2) end if GP.h3 then killAnonymousEventHandler(GP.h3) end GP.h1 = registerAnonymousEventHandler("gmcp.Galdam.Pick.Round", "GaldamPick.onRound") GP.h2 = registerAnonymousEventHandler("gmcp.Galdam.Pick.End", "GaldamPick.onEnd") GP.h3 = registerAnonymousEventHandler("sysConnectionEvent", "GaldamPick.onConnect") GP.makeWindow() if gmcp then GP.onConnect() end echo("[Galdam] 자물쇠 따기 QTE v2 로드됨. `따기 <방향>` 시작, 창 클릭으로 입력.\n")

Script.name: GaldamFishingQTE
Script.script:
-- ===== Galdam 낚시 QTE v6 ===== GaldamFish = GaldamFish or {} local GF = GaldamFish GF.W = 48 GF.biteSound = GF.biteSound or nil -- 입질 효과음 파일/URL 지정 시 재생 function GaldamFish_hit() GaldamFish.hit() end function GaldamFish_press() GaldamFish.press() end function GaldamFish_release() GaldamFish.release() end function GaldamFish_closecard() GaldamFish.closeCard() end function GF.makeWindow() if not GF.win then GF.win = Geyser.Label:new({name = "GaldamFishWin", x = "26%", y = "28%", width = "48%", height = "24%"}) GF.win:setStyleSheet("background-color: rgba(10,22,34,243); border: 2px solid #3a8fb7; border-radius: 10px;") GF.win:setFontSize(13) GF.win:hide() end end function GF.playBiteSound() if GF.biteSound then pcall(function() playSoundFile({name = "galdamBite", file = GF.biteSound}) end) end end -- ========== 입질 연출 (2초 뜸 + 사운드) ========== function GF.onBite() GF.makeWindow() GF.mode = "bite" GF.win:resize("48%", "24%"); GF.win:move("26%", "28%") GF.win:setClickCallback(""); GF.win:setReleaseCallback("") if GF.timer then killTimer(GF.timer) end GF.biteAnim = 0 GF.playBiteSound() GF.win:show() GF.biteTick() end function GF.biteTick() if GF.mode ~= "bite" then return end GF.biteAnim = GF.biteAnim + 1 local big = (GF.biteAnim % 2 == 0) local color = big and "#ff3030" or "#ffcf33" local sz = big and "23px" or "19px" GF.win:echo("


❗ 입질! ❗

찌가 까딱까딱... 곧 챔질 타이밍!
") GF.timer = tempTimer(0.22, GF.biteTick) end -- ========== 챔질 (클릭 타이밍) ========== function GF.renderHook() local cells = {} local needle = math.floor((GF.pos or 0) / 100 * GF.W + 0.5) local zs = math.floor((GF.zstart or 0) / 100 * GF.W + 0.5) local ze = math.floor(((GF.zstart or 0) + (GF.zsize or 0)) / 100 * GF.W + 0.5) local cz = math.floor(((GF.zstart or 0) + (GF.zsize or 0) / 2) / 100 * GF.W + 0.5) for i = 0, GF.W do if i == needle then cells[#cells+1] = "|" elseif i == cz then cells[#cells+1] = "🐟" elseif i >= zs and i <= ze then cells[#cells+1] = "#" else cells[#cells+1] = "~" end end GF.win:echo(string.format( "

[ 🎣 챔질! 찌가 쑥 들어간다 ]

%s

찌(|)가 🐟(초록칸)에 왔을 때  창 클릭!
", table.concat(cells))) end function GF.tickHook() if not GF.active or GF.mode ~= "hook" then return end GF.pos = GF.pos + GF.dir * GF.step if GF.pos >= 100 then GF.pos = 100; GF.dir = -1 end if GF.pos <= 0 then GF.pos = 0; GF.dir = 1 end GF.renderHook() GF.timer = tempTimer(0.045, GF.tickHook) end function GF.onHook(d) d = d or (gmcp and gmcp.Galdam and gmcp.Galdam.Fish and gmcp.Galdam.Fish.Hook) if not d then return end GF.makeWindow() GF.mode = "hook" GF.win:resize("48%", "24%"); GF.win:move("26%", "28%") GF.zstart = tonumber(d.zone_start) or 40 GF.zsize = tonumber(d.zone_size) or 20 GF.step = math.max(1.8, (tonumber(d.speed) or 50) / 12) GF.pos = 0; GF.dir = 1; GF.active = true GF.win:setClickCallback("GaldamFish_hit") GF.win:setReleaseCallback("") if GF.timer then killTimer(GF.timer) end GF.win:show() GF.tickHook() end function GF.hit() if not GF.active or GF.mode ~= "hook" then return end GF.active = false if GF.timer then killTimer(GF.timer); GF.timer = nil end if GF.previewMode then GF.onFight({boxsize = 22, diff = 26}); return end send("qtefish " .. tostring(math.floor((GF.pos or 0) + 0.5))) end -- ========== 힘겨루기 (스타듀 세로막대) ========== function GF.onFight(d) d = d or (gmcp and gmcp.Galdam and gmcp.Galdam.Fish and (gmcp.Galdam.Fish.Fight or gmcp.Galdam.Fish.Reel)) if not d then return end GF.makeWindow() GF.mode = "fight" GF.win:resize("17%", "54%"); GF.win:move("42%", "20%") GF.barHeight = tonumber(d.boxsize) or 22 GF.diff = tonumber(d.diff) or 24 GF.fishPos = 50; GF.fishTarget = 50; GF.fishMoveTimer = 10 GF.barPos = 38; GF.barVel = 0; GF.catch = 26; GF.held = false; GF.active = true GF.win:setClickCallback("GaldamFish_press") GF.win:setReleaseCallback("GaldamFish_release") if GF.timer then killTimer(GF.timer) end GF.win:show() GF.fightTick() end function GF.press() GF.held = true end function GF.release() GF.held = false end function GF.fightTick() if not GF.active or GF.mode ~= "fight" then return end GF.fishMoveTimer = GF.fishMoveTimer - 1 if GF.fishMoveTimer <= 0 then GF.fishTarget = math.random(3, 97) GF.fishMoveTimer = math.random(8, 30) if math.random(100) <= (GF.diff * 0.7) then GF.fishMoveTimer = math.random(3, 9) end end local fs = 1.1 + GF.diff / 36 if GF.fishPos < GF.fishTarget then GF.fishPos = math.min(GF.fishTarget, GF.fishPos + fs) elseif GF.fishPos > GF.fishTarget then GF.fishPos = math.max(GF.fishTarget, GF.fishPos - fs) end if GF.held then GF.barVel = GF.barVel + 0.52 else GF.barVel = GF.barVel - 0.44 end GF.barVel = GF.barVel * 0.90 GF.barPos = GF.barPos + GF.barVel if GF.barPos < 0 then GF.barPos = 0; GF.barVel = GF.barVel * -0.25 end if GF.barPos + GF.barHeight > 100 then GF.barPos = 100 - GF.barHeight; GF.barVel = GF.barVel * -0.25 end if GF.fishPos >= GF.barPos and GF.fishPos <= (GF.barPos + GF.barHeight) then GF.catch = math.min(100, GF.catch + 1.1) else GF.catch = math.max(0, GF.catch - 1.0) end if GF.catch >= 100 then return GF.endFight("land") end if GF.catch <= 0 then return GF.endFight("escape") end GF.renderFight() GF.timer = tempTimer(0.06, GF.fightTick) end function GF.renderFight() local R = 17 local lines = {} local fishR = R - 1 - math.floor((GF.fishPos) / 100 * (R - 1) + 0.5) local boxBot = R - 1 - math.floor((GF.barPos) / 100 * (R - 1) + 0.5) local boxTop = R - 1 - math.floor((GF.barPos + GF.barHeight) / 100 * (R - 1) + 0.5) local catchFill = math.floor((GF.catch) / 100 * R + 0.5) for r = 0, R - 1 do local cm = ((R - r) <= catchFill) and "█" or "█" local inbox = (r >= boxTop and r <= boxBot) local seg if r == fishR then seg = inbox and "🐟" or "🐟" elseif inbox then seg = "█" else seg = "│" end lines[#lines+1] = cm .. "  " .. seg end GF.win:echo("
🎣 " .. math.floor(GF.catch) .. "%
" .. table.concat(lines, "
") .. "
누름↑ 놓음↓
█에 🐟 가두기
") end function GF.endFight(outcome) GF.active = false if GF.timer then killTimer(GF.timer); GF.timer = nil end if GF.win then GF.win:hide() end if GF.previewMode then GF.previewMode = false cecho("\n[낚시 프리뷰] 결과: " .. outcome .. "\n") if outcome == "land" then GF.onCaught({name = "망둥어", image = ""}) end return end send("qtefish_result " .. outcome) end function GF.onEnd() GF.active = false; GF.mode = nil; GF.previewMode = false if GF.timer then killTimer(GF.timer); GF.timer = nil end if GF.win then GF.win:hide() end end -- ========== 포획 카드 (어종 이미지 / 5초 / 클릭 닫기) ========== function GF.makeCard() if not GF.cardWin then GF.cardWin = Geyser.Label:new({name = "GaldamFishCard", x = "34%", y = "20%", width = "32%", height = "52%"}) GF.cardWin:setStyleSheet("background-color: rgba(8,18,28,250); border: 3px solid #d8b15a; border-radius: 12px;") GF.cardWin:setClickCallback("GaldamFish_closecard") GF.cardWin:hide() end end function GF.renderCard(imgOk) local nm = GF.cardName or "물고기" local body if imgOk then body = "









" else body = "


🐟

" end GF.cardWin:echo("
🎣 낚았다!" .. body .. "" .. nm .. "

" .. "창을 클릭하면 닫힘 (5초 후 자동)
") end function GF.onCaught(d) d = d or (gmcp and gmcp.Galdam and gmcp.Galdam.Fish and gmcp.Galdam.Fish.Caught) if not d then return end GF.makeCard() GF.cardName = d.name or "물고기" GF.cardWin:setStyleSheet("background-color: rgba(8,18,28,250); border: 3px solid #d8b15a; border-radius: 12px;") local img = d.image or "" if img ~= "" then local base = img:match("([^/]+)$") or "fish.png" local fn = getMudletHomeDir() .. "/galdamfish_" .. base if io.exists(fn) then GF.cardWin:setStyleSheet("background-color: rgba(8,18,28,250); border: 3px solid #d8b15a; border-radius: 12px; background-image: url(" .. fn .. "); background-repeat: no-repeat; background-position: center;") GF.renderCard(true) else GF.pendingImg = {url = img, file = fn} pcall(function() downloadFile(fn, img) end) GF.renderCard(false) end else GF.renderCard(false) end GF.cardWin:show() if GF.cardTimer then killTimer(GF.cardTimer) end GF.cardTimer = tempTimer(5.0, function() GF.closeCard() end) end function GF.closeCard() if GF.cardTimer then killTimer(GF.cardTimer); GF.cardTimer = nil end if GF.cardWin then GF.cardWin:hide() end end function GF.onDownload(_, path) if GF.pendingImg and path == GF.pendingImg.file then if GF.cardWin and GF.cardWin.shown ~= false then GF.cardWin:setStyleSheet("background-color: rgba(8,18,28,250); border: 3px solid #d8b15a; border-radius: 12px; background-image: url(" .. path .. "); background-repeat: no-repeat; background-position: center;") GF.renderCard(true) end GF.pendingImg = nil end end -- ========== 프리뷰 ========== function GF.preview() GF.previewMode = true GF.onBite() tempTimer(2.0, function() if GF.previewMode then GF.onHook({zone_start = 40, zone_size = 20, speed = 52}) end end) cecho("\n[낚시 프리뷰] 입질 연출 → 챔질(창 클릭) → 힘겨루기 → 포획카드 순으로 시연합니다.\n") end function GF.onPreview() GF.preview() end for _, h in ipairs({"h1","h2","h3","h4","h5","h6","h7"}) do if GF[h] then killAnonymousEventHandler(GF[h]) end end GF.h1 = registerAnonymousEventHandler("gmcp.Galdam.Fish.Hook", "GaldamFish.onHook") GF.h2 = registerAnonymousEventHandler("gmcp.Galdam.Fish.Fight", "GaldamFish.onFight") GF.h3 = registerAnonymousEventHandler("gmcp.Galdam.Fish.End", "GaldamFish.onEnd") GF.h4 = registerAnonymousEventHandler("gmcp.Galdam.Fish.Reel", "GaldamFish.onFight") GF.h5 = registerAnonymousEventHandler("gmcp.Galdam.Fish.Bite", "GaldamFish.onBite") GF.h6 = registerAnonymousEventHandler("gmcp.Galdam.Fish.Preview", "GaldamFish.onPreview") GF.h7 = registerAnonymousEventHandler("gmcp.Galdam.Fish.Caught", "GaldamFish.onCaught") if GF.hdl then killAnonymousEventHandler(GF.hdl) end GF.hdl = registerAnonymousEventHandler("sysDownloadDone", "GaldamFish.onDownload") GF.makeWindow() echo("[Galdam] 낚시 QTE v6 로드됨. 입질연출→챔질→힘겨루기(🐟)→포획카드. 미리보기: 낚시프리뷰\n")

Script.name: GaldamTacticalGrid
Script.script:
-- ===== Galdam 전술 격자 뷰 v6: +연기 셀룰러 확산 시뮬 (스프라이트 제거) ===== GaldamTac = GaldamTac or {} local GT = GaldamTac GT.frame = GT.frame or 0 GT.flash = GT.flash or 0 GT.smoke = GT.smoke or {}
function GT.makeWindow() if not GT.win then GT.win = Geyser.MiniConsole:new({ name = "GaldamTacWin", x = "30%", y = "13%", width = 300, height = 320, autoWrap = false, scrollBar = false, fontSize = 12, color = "black" }) GT.win:setStyleSheet([[ background-color: rgba(10,12,18,242); border: 2px solid #5a8ac8; border-radius: 8px; ]]) GT.win:hide() end end if GaldamTacSprite then if GaldamTacSprite.h1 then pcall(killAnonymousEventHandler, GaldamTacSprite.h1); GaldamTacSprite.h1 = nil end if GaldamTacSprite.h2 then pcall(killAnonymousEventHandler, GaldamTacSprite.h2); GaldamTacSprite.h2 = nil end GaldamTacSprite.onTac = function() end GaldamTacSprite.onRoom = function() end if GaldamTacSprite.win then pcall(function() GaldamTacSprite.win:hide() end); pcall(function() GaldamTacSprite.win:setStyleSheet("background-color: rgba(0,0,0,0);") end) end end
local function clampc(v) return math.max(0, math.min(255, math.floor(v))) end local function dim(rgb, m) if m >= 0.999 then return rgb end local r, g, b = rgb:match("(%d+),(%d+),(%d+)") return clampc(tonumber(r)*m)..","..clampc(tonumber(g)*m)..","..clampc(tonumber(b)*m) end local function brighten(rgb) local r, g, b = rgb:match("(%d+),(%d+),(%d+)") return clampc(tonumber(r)+84)..","..clampc(tonumber(g)+84)..","..clampc(tonumber(b)+94) end local function smAdd(g, x, y, amt, t) local k = x .. "," .. y local c = g[k] if c then c.d = math.min(10, c.d + amt) else g[k] = { d = math.min(10, amt), t = t } end end
-- 연기 셀룰러 확산: emit(소스) → diffuse(이웃) → decay. 밀폐=잔류, 야외=흩어짐+바람 function GT.smokeStep(d) local w = tonumber(d.w) or 9 local h = tonumber(d.h) or 9 local outdoor = (d.biome == "forest") local g = GT.smoke or {} for _, f in ipairs(d.fx or {}) do local x, y = tonumber(f.x), tonumber(f.y) if f.t == "fire" then if y-1 >= 0 then smAdd(g, x, y-1, 3.6, "gray") end elseif f.t == "smoke" then if y-1 >= 0 then smAdd(g, x, y-1, 2.2, "gray") end elseif f.t == "teargas" then smAdd(g, x, y, 5, "gas") elseif f.t == "breath" then if y-1 >= 0 then smAdd(g, x, y-1, 1.8, "white") end elseif f.t == "steam" then if y-1 >= 0 then smAdd(g, x, y-1, 3, "white") end end end local decay = outdoor and 0.70 or 0.94 local spread = 0.5 local ng = {} for k, c in pairs(g) do local cx, cy = k:match("(%-?%d+),(%-?%d+)") cx, cy = tonumber(cx), tonumber(cy) local dens = c.d * decay if dens > 0.35 then smAdd(ng, cx, cy, dens * (1 - spread), c.t) local nbrs if c.t == "gas" then nbrs = {{cx,cy-1,0.5},{cx,cy+1,1.2},{cx-1,cy,1.4},{cx+1,cy,1.4}} else nbrs = {{cx,cy-1,2.3},{cx,cy+1,0.5},{cx-1,cy,1},{cx+1,cy,1}} end if outdoor then nbrs[#nbrs+1] = {cx+1,cy,1.8} end local tot = 0 for _, nb in ipairs(nbrs) do tot = tot + nb[3] end local give = dens * spread for _, nb in ipairs(nbrs) do if nb[1] >= 0 and nb[1] < w and nb[2] >= 0 and nb[2] < h then smAdd(ng, nb[1], nb[2], give * nb[3] / tot, c.t) end end end end GT.smoke = ng end local function smokeActive() return next(GT.smoke or {}) ~= nil end
function GT.render(d) local w = tonumber(d.w) or 9 local h = tonumber(d.h) or 9 local biome = d.biome or "indoor" local tone = tonumber(d.tone) or 3 local dark = tonumber(d.dark) or 0 local litrad = tonumber(d.litrad) or 0 local weather = d.weather or "clear" local outdoor = (biome == "forest") local flash = (GT.flash or 0) > 0 local sx = d.self and tonumber(d.self[1]) local sy = d.self and tonumber(d.self[2])
GT.win:clear() local nm = (gmcp.Galdam and gmcp.Galdam.Room and gmcp.Galdam.Room.name) or "전술 격자"
if (not outdoor) and dark >= 1 and litrad <= 0 then GT.win:decho("<70,72,86> \226\140\150 ???

") for i = 1, math.floor(h/2) do GT.win:decho("<11,11,15>" .. string.rep("\226\150\146", w) .. "
") end GT.win:decho("
<120,120,140> 너무 어두워 아무것도
<120,120,140> 보이지 않는다...
") GT.win:decho("<90,84,70> (라이터나 손전등이 필요하다)
") return end
local cover, actors, ground, fire = {}, {}, {}, {} for _, c in ipairs(d.cover or {}) do cover[tonumber(c.x)..","..tonumber(c.y)] = c end for _, a in ipairs(d.actors or {}) do actors[tonumber(a.x)..","..tonumber(a.y)] = a end for _, g in ipairs(d.ground or {}) do ground[tonumber(g.x)..","..tonumber(g.y)] = g end for _, f in ipairs(d.fx or {}) do if f.t == "fire" then fire[tonumber(f.x)..","..tonumber(f.y)] = true end end local ex = {} for _, e in ipairs(d.exits or {}) do ex[e.edge] = e.dir end local smoke = GT.smoke or {}
local function lightMul(x, y) if outdoor or dark < 1 then return 1.0 end if litrad <= 0 or not sx then return 0.0 end local R = litrad + 1 local dist = math.max(math.abs(x - sx), math.abs(y - sy)) if dist > R then return 0.0 end return math.max(0.14, 1.0 - dist / (R + 0.7)) end local TONE = { [1]={0.70,8,6,26},[2]={0.90,14,11,5},[3]={1.00,0,0,0},[4]={0.84,28,9,0},[5]={0.66,52,14,2},[6]={0.40,2,6,32} } local function tint(rgb) if not outdoor then return rgb end local t = TONE[tone] or TONE[3] local r, g, b = rgb:match("(%d+),(%d+),(%d+)") r = clampc(tonumber(r)*t[1]+t[2]); g = clampc(tonumber(g)*t[1]+t[3]); b = clampc(tonumber(b)*t[1]+t[4]) if weather == "fog" then r=clampc(r*0.55+58); g=clampc(g*0.55+59); b=clampc(b*0.55+61) elseif weather == "storm" then r=clampc(r*0.58+6); g=clampc(g*0.62+11); b=clampc(b*0.68+22) end return r..","..g..","..b end local function floorBg(x, y) if outdoor then local v=(x*7+y*11+x*y)%4; return ({"18,40,20","23,48,25","15,34,17","20,44,22"})[v+1] else return "22,24,30" end end local function cellBg(x, y) if fire[x..","..y] then return "70,26,8" end local sm = smoke[x..","..y] if sm and sm.d >= 3 then local op = math.min(0.7, sm.d/12) local base = (sm.t=="gas") and {150,150,90} or ((sm.t=="white") and {180,182,188} or {95,95,102}) local fb = floorBg(x,y); local r,g,b = (outdoor and tint(fb) or fb):match("(%d+),(%d+),(%d+)") return clampc(tonumber(r)*(1-op)+base[1]*op)..","..clampc(tonumber(g)*(1-op)+base[2]*op)..","..clampc(tonumber(b)*(1-op)+base[3]*op) end local g = ground[x..","..y] if g and g.t == "blood" then local l=tonumber(g.l) or 1; return (32+l*24)..",9,11" elseif g and g.t == "wet" then return "24,38,58" elseif g and g.t == "snow" then return "70,76,88" end return tint(floorBg(x, y)) end
local part = {} if outdoor and (weather == "rain" or weather == "snow" or weather == "storm") then local storm = (weather == "storm") local n = storm and math.floor(w*0.95) or ((weather=="rain") and math.floor(w*0.55) or math.floor(w*0.38)) for i = 1, n do local sp = (weather=="snow") and 1 or (storm and 3 or 2) local col = (i*5+3) % w if weather == "snow" then col = (col + math.floor(GT.frame/4)) % w elseif storm then col = (col + GT.frame) % w end part[col .. "," .. (((i*3)+GT.frame*sp) % h)] = weather end end
local hdr = outdoor and "<150,210,150>" or "<154,208,255>" local tnames = {"새벽","아침","낮","저녁","노을","밤"} GT.win:decho(hdr .. " \226\140\150 " .. nm) if outdoor then local sub = "(" .. (tnames[tone] or "") .. ")" if weather=="rain" then sub=sub.." 비" elseif weather=="snow" then sub=sub.." 눈" elseif weather=="fog" then sub=sub.." 안개" elseif weather=="storm" then sub=sub.." 태풍!" end GT.win:decho("<120,128,148> " .. sub) elseif dark >= 1 then GT.win:decho("<150,140,90> (불빛)") end GT.win:decho("
") GT.win:decho(ex.N and ("<150,255,150> \226\150\178 " .. ex.N .. "
") or "
") local fcol = {"255,150,32","255,92,20","255,205,70"} local midy = math.floor(h / 2) for y = 0, h - 1 do if y == midy and ex.W then GT.win:decho("<150,255,150>\226\151\128") else GT.win:decho(" ") end for x = 0, w - 1 do local key = x .. "," .. y local lm = lightMul(x, y) if lm <= 0.02 then GT.win:decho("<8,8,11:5,5,8> ") else local bg = cellBg(x, y) local g = ground[key] local p = part[key] local sm = smoke[key] local fg, glyph if sx == x and sy == y then fg, glyph = "120,235,255", "@ " elseif actors[key] then local a = actors[key] fg = (a.k=="npc") and "255,210,80" or ((a.k=="player") and "120,230,120" or "255,90,90") glyph = (a.k=="player") and "P " or ((a.k=="npc") and "N " or "X ") elseif fire[key] then fg = fcol[((GT.frame + x + y) % 3) + 1] glyph = (((GT.frame + x) % 2) == 0) and "\226\153\168 " or "\226\150\178 " elseif sm and sm.d > 0.4 then local dd = sm.d local sv = (sm.t=="gas") and "190,190,110" or ((sm.t=="white") and "215,218,226" or "140,140,148") local jit = ((GT.frame + x*2 + y) % 7 < 4) glyph = (dd>=5) and "\226\150\147\226\150\147" or ((dd>=3) and "\226\150\146\226\150\146" or ((dd>=1.5) and (jit and "\226\150\145\226\150\145" or "\194\176\194\176") or "\194\176 ")) fg = sv elseif p == "rain" then fg, glyph = "120,170,225", "\226\148\130 " elseif p == "storm" then fg, glyph = "165,195,235", "/ " elseif p == "snow" then fg, glyph = "230,235,245", "* " elseif cover[key] then local c = cover[key] if c.k == "tree" then fg, bg, glyph = tint("95,205,105"), tint("10,28,12"), "\226\153\160\226\153\160" elseif c.k == "rock" then fg, bg, glyph = tint("155,152,162"), tint("36,36,42"), "\226\151\143\226\151\143" else fg, glyph = "150,110,70", "\226\150\146\226\150\146" end elseif g and g.t == "blood" then local l = tonumber(g.l) or 1 glyph = (l>=5) and "\226\150\147\226\150\147" or ((l>=4) and "\226\150\146\226\150\146" or ((l>=2) and ": " or ". ")) fg = (115+l*20)..",26,28" elseif g and g.t == "wet" then fg, glyph = "90,150,210", "~ " elseif g and g.t == "snow" then fg, glyph = "225,232,244", "\226\151\166 " elseif outdoor then if (x*3+y*5)%5==0 then fg, glyph = tint("78,130,62"), ", " else fg, glyph = tint("40,82,44"), " ." end else fg, glyph = "70,74,88", ". " end local ffg, fbg = dim(fg, lm), dim(bg, lm) if flash then ffg = brighten(ffg); fbg = brighten(fbg) end GT.win:decho("<" .. ffg .. ":" .. fbg .. ">" .. glyph) end end if y == midy and ex.E then GT.win:decho("<150,255,150>\226\150\182") end GT.win:echo("
") end GT.win:decho(ex.S and ("<150,255,150> \226\150\188 " .. ex.S .. "
") or "
") GT.win:decho("<120,130,150> @\235\130\152 N/X NPC/\236\160\129 \226\153\160\235\130\152\235\172\180 \226\151\143\235\176\148\236\156\204
") end
local function fxActive(d) return d and d.fx and type(d.fx)=="table" and #d.fx > 0 end function GT.weatherTick() if not GT.lastData then GT.wtimer = nil; return end local d = GT.lastData local wx = d.weather local anim = (wx == "rain" or wx == "snow" or wx == "storm") or fxActive(d) or smokeActive() if not anim then GT.wtimer = nil; return end GT.frame = (GT.frame or 0) + 1 if (GT.flash or 0) > 0 then GT.flash = GT.flash - 1 end if wx == "storm" and (GT.flash or 0) <= 0 and math.random(100) <= 5 then GT.flash = 2 end if (GT.frame % 2) == 0 then GT.smokeStep(d) end if GT.win and GT.shown then GT.render(d) end GT.wtimer = tempTimer(0.12, "GaldamTac.weatherTick()") end
function GT.onTac() local d = gmcp.Galdam and gmcp.Galdam.Tac if not d then return end GT.makeWindow(); GT.lastData = d; GT.render(d); GT.win:show(); GT.shown = true local wx = d.weather local anim = (wx == "rain" or wx == "snow" or wx == "storm") or fxActive(d) or smokeActive() if anim and not GT.wtimer then GT.wtimer = tempTimer(0.12, "GaldamTac.weatherTick()") end end
function GT.onRoom() if GT.win then GT.win:hide() end GT.shown = false GT.smoke = {} if GT.wtimer then killTimer(GT.wtimer); GT.wtimer = nil end end
if GT.h1 then killAnonymousEventHandler(GT.h1) end if GT.h2 then killAnonymousEventHandler(GT.h2) end GT.h1 = registerAnonymousEventHandler("gmcp.Galdam.Tac", "GaldamTac.onTac") GT.h2 = registerAnonymousEventHandler("gmcp.Galdam.Room", "GaldamTac.onRoom") GT.makeWindow() echo("[Galdam] 전술 격자 뷰 v6 로드됨 (+연기 확산 시뮬, 스프라이트 제거).
")
